data.body: AC amendment: Preserve classifier overlay flags. The security_overlay, performance_overlay, and test_quality_overlay flags computed by review-complexity-classifier.sh on the ORIGINAL full diff must be propagated unchanged to the deep-tier review dispatch in Step 4 for BOTH the CONFIRMED_REFACTOR and FALLBACK paths. Pattern-extraction sampling must NOT suppress overlays. AC: document in Step 4 that overlay flags flow through unmodified.
